nodes.label: <body>
nodes.rationale: Root container. Styled with dynamic radial gradient in daily-calendar.css L35.

nodes.label: <main class='container'>
nodes.rationale: Flex layout container. L51 of CSS defines max-width: 1180px and gap: 16px.

nodes.label: <section class='dd-strip'>
nodes.rationale: Top info strip. L69 CSS: Grid template 1fr 1.2fr 1fr.

nodes.label: <span id='ddWakeVal'>
nodes.rationale: Wake time display. Styled by .strip-val (L121) with font-size: 22px.

nodes.label: <section class='stats-trio'>
nodes.rationale: 3-column grid for stats. L227 CSS: grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr).

nodes.label: <section class='calendar-container'>
nodes.rationale: Main schedule surface. L366 CSS: Background var(--dd-card), border-radius 8px.

nodes.label: <div class='calendar-grid-container'>
nodes.rationale: Scrollable grid wrapper. L378 CSS: position: relative, height: 720px.

nodes.label: <div class='time-axis'>
nodes.rationale: Left time column. L394 CSS: width: 80px, border-right: 1px solid.

nodes.label: <div class='calendar-grid'>
nodes.rationale: The 15-minute grid. L413 CSS: grid-template-rows: repeat(96, 15px).

nodes.label: <div class='task-block'>
nodes.rationale: Event pill. L459 CSS: Absolute positioned with border-left: 4px accent.

nodes.label: :root design tokens
nodes.rationale: Defines --dd-bg, --accent, and --gap (16px) used across all HTML nodes.

nodes.label: .grid-slot
nodes.rationale: Styles individual grid rows. L422: border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08).

nodes.label: .current-time-indicator
nodes.rationale: Styles the red 'Now' line. L589: background: var(--google-red), height: 2px.

edges.rationale: Styles the dynamically generated .grid-slot nodes inside the grid.

hyperedges.label: 15-Minute Precision System
hyperedges.rationale: Combines HTML structure (rows) and CSS sizing (15px) to achieve sub-hour accuracy.
